title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
